---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
format: html
---

<div class="hero">

<img src="images/Abbey_headshot.jpg" class="profile-img">

<h1>Abbey Kealey</h1>

<p class="hero-links">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/abbey-kealey-405473204/">LinkedIn</a> |
<a href="mailto:abbeykealey@gmail.com">Email</a>
</p>

</div>

<div class="bio">

## About Me

Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM) student at UBC with a background in environmental and computer science.

</div>

## Map Gallery

<div class="gallery-container">

  <div class="gallery-item">
    <img src="images/map1.png" alt="Map 1">
    <p>Map 1 Description</p>
  </div>

  <div class="gallery-item">
    <img src="images/map2.png" alt="Map 2">
    <p>Map 2 Description</p>
  </div>

  <div class="gallery-item">
    <img src="images/map3.png" alt="Map 3">
    <p>Map 3 Description</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Add more maps here -->
</div>
